markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GTM performance and align on the KC workshop strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**KC Workshop:** The strategy is set to test a scalable community-seeding model: leverage a co-host's following (\~25k for KC) to drive members via a free, high-value lead magnet.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Lead Magnet Funnel:** A new HubSpot/Sanity funnel will gate content behind a required marketing opt-in to build the Beehive newsletter list, with a new subscription type created to ensure compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** The Lovable workshop yielded \~17 new members. To fix unreliable UTMs, all future events will use unique, trackable promo codes for accurate attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Community Strategy:** Gloria will lead a strategic review of community programs and pricing tiers, benchmarking against models like Maven (not Pavilion) to define a realistic growth path.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Attribution

  - [**Lovable Workshop:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [**Result:** \~17 new members joined via the promo code.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [**Insight:** Co-host promotion (e.g., Lovable's Discord) drove a registration surge from 350 to 1,200.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
      - [**Problem:** Attribution is unreliable; UTMs fail, and the source of 500-600 new Luma registrants is unknown.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Newsletter:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [**KPI:** 45% open rate.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
      - [**Learnings:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
          - [**Successful:** Numbered subjects, direct takeaways.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
          - [**Unsuccessful:** Abstract concepts, too many CTAs (\>10 links).](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
      - [**Goal:** Evolve into a brand with external contributions to reduce the team's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

### Community Strategy & Programs

  - [**Program Simplification:** Consolidating community activities into core programs:](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
      - [**Workshops:** Continue as a key member acquisition channel.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Build-A-Breakfasts:** Member-only events with a structured content flywheel.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
      - [**Newsletter:** Iterating based on performance learnings.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [**Masterclass:** A new, live cohorted workshop launching in late January.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**YouTube:** Experimenting with short videos (5-15 min) driving to lead magnets.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**Lead Magnet Library:** A central hub for gated content.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Event Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**CXO Dinners (re-named "Council Dinners"):**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
          - [**Audience:** Top-tier "Council" members, held quarterly.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
          - [**Purpose:** Curated dialogue, not content distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
          - [**Potential Flywheel:** Sell access directly to attract high-value prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
      - [**Conference Happy Hours:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
          - [**Audience:** Open to members and prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
          - [**Purpose:** Networking and lead capture.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
          - [**Goal:** Co-host with partners to reduce costs.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**Strategic Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)
      - [Gloria will lead a review of community programs and pricing tiers.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)
      - [**Growth Target:** The 10,000-member goal is aggressive; Maven is a more relevant benchmark than Pavilion, which took 6 years and acquired communities.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)

### KC Workshop Execution

  - [**Goal:** Test the scalable co-host model by leveraging KC's \~25k followers.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Lead Magnet:** A free guide ("3 Test Patterns") will be offered to prospects who reply to outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2455.0)
      - [**Content:** Danni to create from KC's notes.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2566.0)
      - [**Format:** A simple webpage built in Sanity (not a PDF) to enable quick iteration.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
  - [**Process Improvements:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Start slide creation earlier to avoid last-minute chaos.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
      - [**Co-host Leverage:** Push co-hosts for more promotional support, as they benefit from our audience.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)

### Technical Infrastructure

  - [**Lead Magnet Funnel (HubSpot/Sanity):**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
      - [**Form:** Ed to build on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Kyle to build in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3062.0)
      - [**Data Flow:** Ed will pass the content link via a hidden form field → Kyle's workflow will use it to send the correct asset.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3086.0)
      - [**Compliance:** A required, unchecked marketing opt-in checkbox is mandatory for GDPR compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3441.0)
  - [**Data Syncs:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3150.0)
      - [**Luma → HubSpot → Beehive:** Live via Zapier.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
      - [**Lead Magnet → HubSpot → Beehive:** Ed to build.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3381.0)
      - [**Circle → HubSpot:** Low priority.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3150.0)
  - [**Community Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3548.0)
      - [**Problem:** Circle's native reporting is insufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3548.0)
      - [**Solution:** Kyle to help define key KPIs before building a custom HubSpot dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3548.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2671.0)

  - [**Danni:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2566.0)
      - [Create content for the "3 Test Patterns" lead magnet (Due: EOD tomorrow).](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2566.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2704.0)
      - [Get lead magnet copy from Kyle for the KC workshop outreach (Due: EOD today).](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2704.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3062.0)
      - [Create the general content download form and HubSpot workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3062.0)
      - [Help define community reporting KPIs with Gloria.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3548.0)
  - [**Ed:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
      - [Build the lead magnet form on the website, passing the content link via a hidden field.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3062.0)
      - [Build the automation to sync lead magnet contacts to Beehive.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=3381.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2344.0)
      - [Finalize KC workshop and lead magnet campaigns before the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/f2GCYLyxM91kT3cTitDsnoQ83sko7CA1?tab=summary&timestamp=2344.0)
